2605.23094.title: Do Synthetic Brain MRIs Reliably Improve Tumour Classification? A StyleGAN2-ADA Class-Plane Augmentation Study on BRISC 2025
2605.23094.paper_summary: Generative augmentation is often proposed as a remedy for small medical-image datasets, but synthetic images are only useful when they improve downstream task performance. "Augmentation" here means synthetic supplementation: GAN-generated samples added to the real training pool, not geometric or photometric transforms of existing images. Twelve class-plane StyleGAN2-ADA generators were trained on constrained BRISC 2025 partitions to test whether their output, with or without InceptionV3 feature-space filtering, improves held-out tumour classification across three classifier families: a random forest (RF) on InceptionV3 features, a compact two-headed convolutional neural network (CNN), and MobileViTV2, a mobile hybrid convolutional-transformer. Each was evaluated at 1:1 and 1:2 real-to-synthetic ratios. An independent GPT-5.5 blind test placed gated real-versus-synthetic discrimination at 57.73% (95% CI: 54.48--60.92%) on the model-legible subset -- modestly above chance. The RF classifier did not benefit from the synthetic MRIs. The CNN showed consistent mean gains that did not survive Holm correction. MobileViTV2 showed the clearest benefit: filtered 1:1 augmentation improved tumour classification accuracy by 1.02% absolute (95% CI: 0.54--1.54%; Holm-corrected p = 0.0104). A secondary efficiency analysis found that every augmented CNN condition selected its checkpoint 42--64% earlier than baseline, while compute-matched MobileViTV2 runs reached selection after 50--67% fewer real-data epochs. Overall, augmentation utility was found to be architecture- and ratio-dependent, not guaranteed by visual fidelity alone.
2605.23094.paper_summary_zh: 生成增強常被提議作為小型醫療影像數據集的解決方案，但合成影像只有在提升下游任務表現時才有用。這裡的「增強」指的是合成補充：將GAN生成的樣本添加到真實訓練池中，而不是對現有影像進行幾何或光度變換。十二個類別平面StyleGAN2-ADA生成器在受限的BRISC 2025分區上進行訓練，以測試其輸出是否在有或沒有InceptionV3特徵空間過濾的情況下，能改善三個分類器家族的腫瘤分類：基於InceptionV3特徵的隨機森林（RF）、一個緊湊的雙頭卷積神經網絡（CNN），以及MobileViTV2，一個移動混合卷積-Transformer。每個模型在1:1和1:2的真實對合成比率下進行評估。一個獨立的GPT-5.5盲測試將門控真實與合成的區分率放在57.73%（95% CI: 54.48--60.92%）的模型可識別子集上——略高於隨機機率。RF分類器未從合成MRI中受益。CNN顯示出一致的平均增益，但未能通過Holm修正。MobileViTV2顯示出最明顯的好處：過濾的1:1增強將腫瘤分類準確率提高了1.02%的絕對值（95% CI: 0.54--1.54%；Holm修正p = 0.0104）。一項次級效率分析發現，每個增強的CNN條件選擇其檢查點的時間比基線早42--64%，而計算匹配的MobileViTV2運行在50--67%更少的真實數據時期後達到選擇。總體而言，增強的效用被發現依賴於架構和比率，而不僅僅是由視覺保真度所保證。
2605.23094.author: José Rafael Noriega Cedeño et.al.
